title: Smoking status surgical documentation

assessment.text: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.
assessment.rationale: Supports tobacco-status identification and documentation for surgical smoking status documentation; no decision is generated.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.

source.title: Practical Guideline for Management of Tobacco Dependence

exact_section.heading: Who Can Use this Guide and Basic and Essential Facts

assessment.text: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.
assessment.rationale: Supports product use, smoking rate, dependence, quit attempts, readiness and barriers for surgical smoking status documentation; no decision is generated.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.

source.title: Practical Guideline for Management of Tobacco Dependence

exact_section.heading: The 5 As and Identification and Assessment of Tobacco Use Status

referral.text: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.

referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.

Operation and timing, tobacco product quantities, perioperative risk discussion, cessation plan, pharmacotherapy, contraindications, responsible clinician and surgical scheduling decision remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for surgical smoking status documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
